form.label: Network Conversations by Autonomous Systems TS

search.query: | tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ $ipv4_and_or_v6$ direction="inbound" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) PREFIX(src_asn=) protocol_ts direction action nfo_hostname $span_token$ | search $blocked_flows$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_port= as dest_port | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | rename src_asn= as src_asn | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS src_asn OUTPUT asname as src_asn_name | strcat src_asn ": " src_asn_name src_as_full | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | `dedup_timechart_ts` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by src_as_full,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ $ipv4_and_or_v6$ direction="outbound" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_port=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) PREFIX(dest_asn=) protocol_ts direction action nfo_hostname $span_token$ | search $blocked_flows$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_port= as dest_port | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | rename dest_asn= as dest_asn | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS dest_asn OUTPUT asname as dest_asn_name | strcat dest_asn ": " dest_asn_name dest_as_full | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | `dedup_timechart_ts` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by dest_as_full,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ $ipv4_and_or_v6$ direction="inbound" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_asn=) direction action nfo_hostname $span_token$ | search $blocked_flows$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_asn= as src_asn | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS src_asn OUTPUT asname as src_asn_name | strcat src_asn ": " src_asn_name src_as_full | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_as_full | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_as_full | sort 0 by - TrafficAmount | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name src_as_full "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_as_full as "Autonomous System"

| tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" $advanced_filter$ $ipv4_and_or_v6$ direction="outbound" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(dest_asn=) direction action nfo_hostname $span_token$ | search $blocked_flows$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename dest_asn= as dest_asn | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` asn_lookup asn AS dest_asn OUTPUT asname as dest_asn_name | strcat dest_asn ": " dest_asn_name dest_as_full | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes by nfo_hostname exp_ip dest_as_full _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip dest_as_full | sort 0 by - TrafficAmount | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name dest_as_full "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename dest_as_full as "Autonomous System"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
